reviews.review_title: Great for everyone who loves dinosaurs
reviews.review_description:
DinoPlanet is a your personal dinosaur amusement park and zoo! Whether enjoying the guided documententary, exploring the zoo, customizing your welcome center and petting zoo. Or trying to master the arcade games dinoplanet is a packed experience. 

Ar dinosaurs in the quest 3 are a particular treat!

I knew they were big but seeing the dinosaurs in Dinoplanet really drives it home! This does a great job at showing just how big they were compared to us. There’s so much to learn about them in the game and the narration is fantastic. Highly recommend to all dinosaur enthusiasts!

DinoPlanet is a hidden gem, a labor of love by a passionate and dedicated creator. The game's museum is a safari of prehistoric wonders, offering a delightful blend of dinosaur exhibits, arcade games, and collectibles.

My favorite exhibit is the underwater scene, which boasts a diverse array of creatures. The visuals and movement are absolutely mesmerizing!

I highly recommend this game for dinosaur enthusiasts and anyone interested in a unique prehistoric-themed experience!
